# viettelidc_ovpc_hosts_by_customer (Data Source)

Data source for listing hosts by customer.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `customer_id` (String) Customer ID. Defaults to provider config.
- `host_id` (Number) Host ID. Defaults to provider config.
- `plan_type` (String) Plan type, defaults to 'k8s'.
- `provider_id` (Number) Provider ID. Defaults to 7.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID. Defaults to provider config.

### Read-Only

- `hosts` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--hosts))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--hosts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `hosts`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `ip` (String)
- `name` (String)
